$comment: Model manifest. The scene loads assets by KEY from this file. Add a file to /public/models, then register it here. 'file' is relative to /public. 'scale' is a uniform multiplier. Houses are keyed by rarity tier.

tree.$comment: Single combined hero tree (Sketchfab, optimized 81MB->12.5MB). Trunk(bark) and leaf meshes are SEPARATE inside the glb, so leaves can be revealed independently. tree.original.glb is the uncompressed backup.

island.$comment: Floating island base (Blender OBJ -> glb, centered at origin, optimized 84MB->11.25MB). Tree + houses are planted on its top surface. Original textures were missing (Windows C:/ paths in the .mtl) so it loads with base material colors - assign low-poly flat materials in code per the art direction.

houses.$comment: All buildings live in one village pack glb; each tier is a mesh name inside it (meshes are stacked at origin, extracted by name). Each house perches on a mini floating-island disc on a branch.
